edition.name: MegaTraveller
edition.source: Extracted from MT_MegaTraveller_Players_Manual.pdf, primarily Basic Character Creation printed pages 20-25, with lifecycle rules cross-checked against printed pages 14-17 and aging rules on printed page 47. Cross-validated against https://traveller.chromeblack.com/files/mtpcgen.html — all 18 services agree on every cell.

title: MegaTraveller Players Manual Character Creation Data
extractionNotes: Basic character generation lifecycle, prior service tables, ranks, mustering-out benefits, cash benefits, acquired skills, default skills, and automatic rank/service skills are from printed pages 20-25.
Lifecycle prose for enlistment, draft, survival, position/commission, promotion, special duty, reenlistment, and mustering-out was cross-checked against printed pages 14-17.
Aging effects were added from the enhanced character generation aging table on printed page 47.

Service table values were visually verified from rendered page images and text conversion output; terminology is retained in the same normalized app-facing schema as the existing MT data where values are semantically identical.
Advanced character generation common tables and the Mercenary, Navy, Scout, and Merchant Prince table pages were added from printed pages 47, 50-51, 54-55, 58-59, and 62-65.

mt.title: MegaTraveller Players Manual
mt.notes: PDF pages 22-27 in the file correspond to printed pages 20-25 for the consolidated Basic Character Creation tables.

mtExtensions.homeworld: Generate homeworld (Starport/Size/Atmos/Hydro/Pop/Law/Tech). Tech>=7 grants Computer-0; Tech 3-8 grants Wheeled Vehicle-0; Tech>=9 grants Grav Vehicle-0. Tech<5 hides Army/Marines/Navy/Scientist/Noble. Tech<7 hides Scout/Merchant/Belter/Pirate. Tech<3 hides Flyer/Law Enforcer/Doctor/Diplomat/Rogue. Tech>=3 hides Barbarian. Soc<10 hides Noble.
mtExtensions.term1Bonus: Careers with skillsPerTerm=1 receive +1 additional skill in term 1.
mtExtensions.specialDutyDoubleBonus: Special Duty roll 4+ over target grants 2 skills instead of 1.
mtExtensions.commissionPromotionDoubleBonus: Commission or Promotion roll 4+ over target grants 2 bonus skills instead of 1.
mtExtensions.mandatoryReenlistOn12: Rolling exactly 12 on reenlistment forces another term.
mtExtensions.belterTerm3ZeroG: Belter automatically gains Zero-G Environ-1 at start of term 3.

survival.optionalDeathRule: Referee or player may decide that failure of the survival throw results in death and that a new character must be generated.

reenlistment.mandatoryRollNote: A reenlistment throw of exactly 12 calls for mandatory reenlistment; Bureaucrats must reenlist if the reenlistment throw is successful.

draft.note: Failed enlistment is followed by a 1D draft roll using each service's 'draft' field. Draft assignment overrides homeworld career restrictions. Drafted characters cannot receive a commission during their first term of service.

merchantBonus.rule: Successful bonus throw lets the character roll once on the Cash mustering-out table and receive half the indicated amount.

Scout Ship.ownership: Loaned/detached duty; effectively possessed but cannot be sold.

Corsair.repeat: No additional benefit; one ship maximum.

Weapon.repeat: May select same weapon again, a different weapon, or one level of skill in a weapon previously taken as a mustering-out benefit.

notes: Two skills per term; no ranks, commissions, or promotions.

enlistment.special: Characters with Social Standing 10+ are eligible for Noble service; enlistment is automatic. Initial rank derives from Social Standing once Position is achieved.

pdfExtraction.imageVerification: pdftoppm rendered PDF pages 22-27 at 220 DPI

homeworld.description: Roll 2D on each column to determine the homeworld's profile. Result of 12 on starport requires an extra 1D roll. Each column has DMs based on previously-rolled values; tech is rolled last and consumes DMs from starport/size/hydrosphere/population.

starportXRoll.comment: When starport rolls 12 (D-X), roll 1D to determine specific code.

lawCodes.Low Law: Machineguns, autorifles, energy weapons, body pistols prohibited.

aging.source: MegaTraveller Players Manual enhanced character generation aging table, printed page 47

honors.benefit: Education becomes 10 or current Education +1, whichever is greater.

skills.rule: Select one Merchant department and throw for three department skills.

trigger.rule: Decoration roll fails by 6 or more (e.g., rolls a 4 when 10+ is required).

dieResults.result: Death; escape, killing 1D guards; KCr100 reward

browniePoints.rule: Brownie points are one-use DMs that may be applied to any die roll after it has been rolled.

notes: A negative survival DM can be converted into an equal positive decoration DM.
The reverse is allowed, but failure of the decoration roll by 6+ requires a court-martial roll.

checklist: Resolve four one-year assignments per term
Conclude term with aging, reenlistment, or mustering out

army.academyRank: O1 from Military Academy or college OTC

marines.academyRank: O1 from Naval Academy or college NOTC

draft.note: Drafted characters cannot receive a commission during the first four-year term.

initialTraining: One skill from selected combat arm on MOS table

notes: Used only by officers rank O1+.
Marines never serve on Counterinsurgency or Internal Security; those results become Ship's Troops.

Cross-Training.summary: Select any combat arm (not Commandos) for cross-training. Roll for one skill on the MOS table.

Specialist School.summary: Throw 1D on the Specialist School table.

Commando School.summary: Cross-training in Commandos. Throw 5+ (1D) for each listed skill.

OCS.summary: Advance to rank O1 (E7 advances to O2) in current or cross-trained branch. Roll twice on Service Skills and once on MOS. E8/E9 commissioned to O3 with no skills.

Attache/Aide.summary: Roll 1D: 1-4 attache, 5-6 aide. Attache: +1 rank and +1 Social. Aide: +1 Social and select command duty or other special assignment (not Attache/Aide).

notes: Schooling column is used when Int + Edu is greater than 16.

dms.note: max NCO Skills DM +2 (E7 already grants the second +1)

notes: Per manual p. 51: Command/Staff/Shipboard DM columns apply at rank thresholds — see per-row entries when wired into roll site.

dms.note: cross-trained in Artillery or Cavalry and reenlisting into either arm

checklist: Generate character, homeworld, and subsector tech code
Enlist in Imperial Fleet, Reserve Fleet, or System Squadron
Resolve four one-year assignments per term
Conclude term with aging, reenlistment, or mustering out

notes: Automatic Medical for Medical School graduates or unsuccessful Medical School; automatic Flight for Flight School graduates; Social Standing 9+ may choose.

initialTraining.officer: Two Branch Skills or Officer Staff Skills

retention.rule: Next assignment repeats previous assignment; not more than once in succession; never involuntary after a four-year term; not on special assignments.

Cross-Training.summary: Select any branch; the individual is now cross-trained in it. Roll for one skill on that branch table.

Specialist School.summary: Throw 1D on the Specialist School table.

Gunnery School.summary: Make four throws (1D); on each 5+ receive Gunnery.

OCS.summary: Advance to O1 (E7 advances to O2) in current or any cross-trained branch. Roll twice on Service Skills and once on Branch Skills. E8/E9 receive direct commission to O3 with no new skills.

Naval Attache.summary: Roll 1D: 1-4 attache, 5-6 aide. Attache: +1 rank and +1 Social. Aide: +1 Social and select command duty or other special assignment (not Naval Attache/Aide).

notes: Schooling is for Int + Edu greater than 16.

dms.note: cumulative with the O4+ entry brings total to +4

reenlistment.branchChange: May reenlist into a different branch only if cross-trained in it.
reenlistment.fleetChange: Cannot transfer between System Squadron, Reserve Fleet, and Imperial Navy.

checklist: Resolve four one-year assignments per term
Conclude term with aging, reenlistment, or mustering out

enlistment.automatic: College graduates may choose automatic enlistment; honors graduates start at IS-10.

notes: Honors graduates choose initial office assignment.

dms.note: voluntary; natural 2 still forces war mission

notes: Roll twice for Ship School, Intelligence School, and Contact School; roll once for the other schools.

reenlistment.upOrOut: Ordinary rank must be at least equal to number of terms served or reenlistment is not permitted.

checklist: Resolve four one-year assignments per term
Conclude term with aging, reenlistment, or mustering out

notes: Homeworld starport must meet or exceed minimum. Free Traders are a special case, neither large nor small.
Free Traders are assigned to Free Trader department and cannot change positions.
Free Traders throw 8+ with DM +1 if Int 9+.

businessSchool.effect: DM +1 on exam for O6+; transfer to Sales.

commission.effect: Receive rank O0, or O1 in Free Traders, and determine department assignment normally. Must pass exam for O1 within 4 years or revert to enlisted rank.

departmentTest.effect: May take department test without regard for skill requirements.
